expectations.evidence: JSDoc on generateToken: `Generates a salted SHA-256 token from the given payload. Note: the salt is not preserved, so the token cannot be verified later.`
No why-comment explaining the choice of sha256+salt vs base64 or why salt is used. The JSDoc describes what but not why.
Trivial comments like '// Create the hash', '// Import dependencies' etc. all removed.
No section dividers present in output.
Bare TODOs and FIXME still present: `// TODO: add token verification`, `// TODO: add token refresh`, `// FIXME: salt should be stored somewhere so tokens can be verified`
